# freetipcalculator.app

> Free online tip calculator. Enter your bill, pick a tip percentage, split between people, and see tip amount, total, and per-person cost instantly. No signup, no tracking — runs in your browser.

## Key Facts
- Tip presets: 10%, 15%, 18%, 20%, 22%, 25%, 30%, and custom
- Split bills between 1 to 20 people
- Shows tip amount, total with tip, and per-person amount
- All calculations happen client-side in the browser
- No server communication, no analytics, no cookies
- Part of the Freesuite collection at freesuite.app

## Features
- Instant calculation as you type
- 8 preset tip percentages plus custom input
- Bill splitter for groups up to 20
- Works offline as a PWA
- Dark mode (shared across all Freesuite tools)
- Mobile-first responsive design

## Pages
- [Home](https://freetipcalculator.app/) — Main tip calculator tool
- [vs Calculator.net](https://freetipcalculator.app/pages/vs-calculator-net) — Comparison with Calculator.net
- [vs Omnicalculator](https://freetipcalculator.app/pages/vs-omnicalculator) — Comparison with Omnicalculator
- [Restaurant Tip Guide](https://freetipcalculator.app/pages/restaurant-tip-guide) — How much to tip at restaurants
- [Delivery Tip Guide](https://freetipcalculator.app/pages/delivery-tip-guide) — How much to tip delivery drivers
- [Bill Splitter](https://freetipcalculator.app/pages/bill-splitter) — How to split restaurant bills

For the complete text content of all pages, see [llms-full.txt](https://freetipcalculator.app/llms-full.txt).
